A '''Tusken battle talisman''' was an artifact of the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] carved from a [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] horn that was believed to give the owner the strength of a bantha and the courage to face death. It had the word "luck" engraved in [[Aurebesh/Legends|aurebesh]] on it.

[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] owned one of these as a lucky charm, although he lost it. It was later discovered to have somehow ended up in his [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|pet rancor's]] body, which [[Jubnuk/Legends|Jubnuk]] retrieved when he unwittingly fell into the chamber while trying to defend Jabba from [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].
